title: Which is better?
learningGoal: Speak fluently using short comparatives, long comparatives, and irregular comparatives to express an opinion.
instructions: 犬と猫を比較して意見を言います。マイクに向かって、「犬は猫より大きいです。犬は猫よりエネルギッシュです。私は犬の方が良いと思います」と英語で話してください。(Compare dogs and cats. Speak into the microphone and say: 'Dogs are bigger than cats. Dogs are more energetic than cats. I think dogs are better.')
speakingPrompt: Say: 'Dogs are bigger than cats. Dogs are more energetic than cats. I think dogs are better.'
scenario: You are talking to a friend about your favorite pets.

subTasks.prompt: Say dogs are bigger than cats. (Dogs are bigger than cats.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: ドッグス アー ビガー ザン キャッツ。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 犬は猫より大きいです。

subTasks.prompt: Say dogs are more energetic. (Dogs are more energetic than cats.)

sampleResponse.targetText: Dogs are more energetic than cats.
sampleResponse.transliteration: ドッグス アー モア エナジェティック ザン キャッツ。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 犬は猫よりエネルギッシュです。

subTasks.prompt: Say you think dogs are better. (I think dogs are better.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: アイ シンク ドッグス アー ベター。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 私は犬の方が良いと思います。

scenarioContext.targetText: Do you like dogs or cats?
scenarioContext.transliteration: ドゥー ユー ライク ドッグス オア キャッツ？
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: あなたは犬と猫どちらが好きですか？

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ドッグス アー ビガー ザン キャッツ。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 犬は猫より大きいです。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: Dogs are more energetic than cats.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ドッグス アー モア エナジェティック ザン キャッツ。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 犬は猫よりエネルギッシュです。

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: アイ シンク ドッグス アー ベター。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 私は犬の方が良いと思います。

acceptableParaphrases: Dogs are bigger than cats. Dogs are more energetic than cats. I think dogs are better than cats.

criteria.name: Comparatives
criteria.description: Critical use of bigger, more energetic, and better.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Dogs are bigger than cats. Dogs are more energetic than cats. I think dogs are better.

feedbackRules.onPass: Excellent speaking! You successfully used three different types of comparatives.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Pay close attention to the grammar: use 'bigger' (not more big) and 'better' (not gooder).
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Make sure you clearly pronounce the word 'than' when comparing.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Dogs are bigger than cats. Dogs are more energetic than cats. I think dogs are better.

hintText: Don't forget the 'are'! 'Dogs bigger than cats' is incorrect. It must be 'Dogs ARE bigger than cats'.
